findings.description: The signature image in the HTML includes surrounding text ('Sincerely,', 'David Miller, PE', 'State Mi...') that is also rendered as separate HTML text, creating visible duplication in the reading flow.
findings.evidence: PDF shows one 'Sincerely,' followed by the signature, then 'David Miller, PE / State Mining Engineer'. HTML shows 'Sincerely,' as text, then a signature image that itself contains 'Sincerely,' and 'David Miller, PE / State Mi...' text, then again 'David Miller, PE' and 'State Mining Engineer' as HTML text below the image.
